title: zygogynum mackeei subsp. mackeei
intro: Zygogynum mackeei subsp. mackeei, a species of flowering plant, is a type of evergreen shrub or tree native to New Caledonia. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. It is believed to provide various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies, including infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
